summaryForNext: Phase closed: 3/3 goals MET (G1 DB-route governance lint on the merged set at startup + hot-reload with reject-and-retain-last-good + a rejection metric; G2 immutable sugar overlay on AuthzEngine merged into the DB-backed engine, refuse-start guard removed, deny-wins via Cedar; G3 structured-only /tool-scopes admin endpoint + Policies-tab builder UI). 3/3 changes archived, 100% first-pass QA, zero constraint violations, zero new deps, 475 core tests green + web build green. Three security-review findings (all in this session's own code) fixed pre-archive: 2 LOW (stale docstring; added flint_governance_reload_rejected_total) + 1 MEDIUM (unenforced PolicyId-namespace invariant let a privileged admin silently suppress a config deny: -> fixed with a reserved-prefix 400-guard). G3 (highest-risk) passed with NO findings — the API-boundary injection re-check confirmed no arbitrary-Cedar injection. Recurring pattern = the reviewer keeps catching documented-but-unenforced invariants (last phase advisory-vs-refuse, this phase a claimed id-disjointness) -> lesson: enforce a doc-asserted safety property in code as the same task. Sycophancy gate: 0.0, no S-08. Debt deferred: config-sugar hot-reload (overlay fixed at startup); tool-scope UI is create/replace not a round-trip editor; internal_error leaks DB strings on the loopback admin surface. TWO recommended next phases (operator picks): Option A agent-approval-and-step-up-flows (RequireApproval is modeled but the end-to-end pause->surface-over-AG-UI/A2UI->resume flow + pending-approvals UI aren't built; MEDIUM-HIGH); Option B agent-governance-observability-and-ops (dashboard over flint_tool_authz_total / flint_agent_budget_denied_total / flint_governance_reload_rejected_total + the authz audit table; MEDIUM). Debt-paydown can ride along. Still authorization-first; federate any JWKS IdM (Ory reference), never an IdP; LLM-ops bundle out of scope; criteria profile effort-impact.
